challenge.title: Two-factor authentication
challenge.description: Enter the code from your authenticator app or use a backup code.
challenge.backupHint: Each backup code can only be used once.

setup.downloadDescription: Each code can be used once.
setup.downloadStorageHint: Keep them in a safe place.
setup.introDescription: Increase your account security with two-factor authentication.
setup.scanDescription: Scan the QR code and then enter the 6-digit code.
setup.backupDescription: Save these codes in a safe place. You will need them if you lose access to your authenticator app.
setup.appIntro: You need an authenticator app such as:
setup.shownOnce: These codes are only shown once!

disable.title: Disable 2FA
disable.description: Are you sure? Your account will be less secure afterwards.
disable.removeTrustedDevices: All trusted devices will be removed
disable.passwordOnly: Your account will only be protected by your password

backupCodes.downloadDescription: Each code can be used once.
backupCodes.downloadStorageHint: Keep them in a safe place.
backupCodes.title: Backup codes
backupCodes.newCodesDescription: Your new backup codes have been generated. Store them safely!
backupCodes.remainingDescription: You still have {count} unused backup codes.
backupCodes.shownOnce: These codes are only shown once!
backupCodes.regenerateWarning: All existing backup codes will become invalid. Store the new codes safely.
backupCodes.description: Backup codes can be used when you do not have access to your authenticator app. Each code can only be used once.
backupCodes.lowWarning: You only have a few backup codes left. Generate new codes for emergencies.

trustedDevices.title: Trusted devices
trustedDevices.description: No 2FA code is required on these devices.
trustedDevices.confirmRemoveAllDescription: You will need to confirm 2FA again on all devices. This action cannot be undone.

statusCard.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
statusCard.description: Increase your account security with a second verification step
statusCard.lowBackupWarning: Few backup codes remaining. Generate new codes for emergencies.
statusCard.intro: With 2FA enabled, you need both your password and a code from your authenticator app to sign in.
statusCard.appSupport: Works with Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.

hooks.backupGenerateError: Backup codes could not be generated
